title: Medusantha crinita
taxonomy: Medusantha crinita is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the order Lamiales and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is part of the genus Medusantha, which is a small group of flowering plants. Further classification includes its family being a part of the larger group called Asterids. Medusantha crinita is also known as a hairy medusantha due to its hairy appearance.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may aid in the management of various conditions including fever and gastrointestinal issues.
